definition:
1. to mark in  or on, to paint on , (Herdotus Historicus) 
2. to inscribe, write in  or on , (Herdotus Historicus):—;Pass., ἐγγεγραμμένος τι having  something written on  it, (Sophocles Tragicus); so Virgil  flores inscripti nomina.  
3. to enter in the public register , ἐγγρ. τὸν υἱὸν εἰς ἄνδρας (Demosthenes Orator):—;Pass., εἰς τοὺς δημότας ἐγγραφῆναι (Demosthenes Orator) 
4. to enter on the judge's list, to indict , (Aristophanes Comicus) (ML)
